task_completion.description: Navigate to the branch policies page for the 'main' branch in the TailwindTraders repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screenshot shows the Azure DevOps 'Branch Policies' settings page. The breadcrumbs, header, or sidebar should indicate the project is 'TailwindTraders', the repository is 'TailwindTraders', and the selected branch is 'main'.

task_completion.description: Enable the policy requiring a minimum number of reviewers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Require a minimum number of reviewers' toggle switch and verify it is in the 'On' (active/colored) position.

task_completion.description: Set the minimum number of reviewers to 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the enabled 'Require a minimum number of reviewers' policy, look for the numeric input field for the number of reviewers and verify it contains the number '2'.

task_completion.description: Enable the policy requiring linked work items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Check for linked work items' toggle switch, verify it is in the 'On' position, and ensure its requirement level is set to 'Required' (not 'Optional').

task_completion.description: Enable the policy requiring comment resolution.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Check for comment resolution' toggle switch, verify it is in the 'On' position, and ensure its requirement level is set to 'Required' (not 'Optional').

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Azure DevOps web interface to configure the policies.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Azure DevOps web GUI being interacted with (clicks, toggles, typing) rather than just a terminal window executing API curl commands or a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent applied the policies to the correct project, repository, and branch.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the page context explicitly shows 'TailwindTraders' for both project and repo, and 'main' for the branch. It should not be applied to 'master' or a different repository.

integrity.description: The agent actually configured the settings rather than just viewing an already configured page or pasting text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate screenshots showing the toggles being switched from Off to On, or the number '2' being typed into the reviewer count field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project: TailwindTraders. Repository: TailwindTraders. Branch: main. Expected reviewer count: 2. The VLM should verify the Azure DevOps branch policies page for 'main' shows three specific policies enabled: 1) 'Require a minimum number of reviewers' (set to 2), 2) 'Check for linked work items' (set to Required), 3) 'Check for comment resolution' (set to Required).
